applicability: direct and transitive dependencies, binaries, build tools, and plugins
release inventory, provenance, vulnerability, license, notice, and artifact integrity
exception_policy: Only the consuming organization's approved supply-chain or legal policy authority may approve an exception, which binds the exact input, risk, scope, owner, approval, compensating controls, expiry, and remediation or removal plan.
rationale: Releases require exact resolution, provenance, integrity, complete inventory, and human-owned vulnerability and legal decisions without invented organization policy values.
review_cadence: Review every dependency or origin change and every release, plus organization-defined supply-chain/legal reviews and any vulnerability, license, provenance, package-manager, signing, or policy change.
title: Supply Chain and Legal Governance
